text:
Setl City (, Setoru-shi) is a city within the Republic of Rokario. 

Overview

The city of Setl is a city that's located in the Republic of Rokario and is close to the Bilgai Desert. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

The location of Setl City appears on Killua's Beatle-07 map. 

Translations around the World

Trivia

Setl City does not appear in the 2011 anime adaptation.

References
